node.title: Uber SDE-1 OA (24th Feb) – Guidance Needed for Coding + BPS Round

article.title: Uber SDE-1 OA (24th Feb) – Guidance Needed for Coding + BPS Round
article.content:
Hi everyone,

I recently completed the Online Assessment for Uber SDE-1 on 24th February. I’m now preparing for the next stage, which I’ve heard includes a Coding + BPS (Business Problem Solving) Round.

I would really appreciate it if someone who has recently gone through this round could share insights on:
- What is the difficulty level of coding problems?
- Key topics to focus on for preparation?
- Since I’m a fresher, what level of HLD (High-Level Design) is expected? What kind of system design concepts should I prepare — like scalability basics, APIs, databases, caching, load balancing, etc.? Is deep distributed systems knowledge required, or are fundamentals enough for SDE-1?

post.content: did you get interview invite ?\nor you got shortlisted ?
How many question did u solve all 3?

Hi,

Thank you for taking the time to complete the assessment with us. We truly appreciate the effort and preparation that goes into participating in the process.

At this time, the available roles have been filled. However, based on your performance in the test, we would like to keep you on our waitlist. As and when additional roles open up based on business demand, we will revisit profiles from this pool and will reach out to you accordingly.

We were impressed with your performance and thank you once again for your interest in opportunities with us.

Wishing you all the very best.
 
Thanks,
uBecome Emerging Talent Acquisition Team, Uber
